untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific indicators (put time value premium, dividend payment amount, ex-dividend date) which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The strategy involves derivative pricing (put options) and corporate action timing (dividend ex-dates) that cannot be expressed using only price, technical, and volume indicators. This is an options arbitrage strategy requiring market data outside standard OHLCV technical analysis.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_433 is a discount arbitrage strategy combining put option purchases with long stock positions to capture dividend value. This requires: (1) option-specific pricing data not in allowed indicators, (2) dividend calendar data not available, (3) ex-dividend date detection. A backtest engine without options chain and corporate action data cannot implement this signal.
